narrative:
Aid Twp. township has 531 registered voters, with 47.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.5 percentage points.
